MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARROW, SANDRA AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SANDRA FARROW LIVING TRUST COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-24-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE JACK ERTOLA, K.LEE/CLERK, D.PADILLA/CSR 10:15AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. STEVE LITTMAN FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFT, LELAND ELLSWORTH IS PRESENT IN PRO PER WITNESSES S&E AND EXHIBITS ARE INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. BOTH SIDES REST AND OFFER CLOSING ARGUMENT. COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLSWORTH, LELAND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 810 "A" GROVE STREET, S.F. $7,404.00 RENT, $1,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $163.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,617.00, LEASE FORFEITED
